name: AWS Customer Agreement
draft: The contract between Amazon Web Services and a customer of its compute service; it is the master agreement for the service this entry tracks.

name: AWS Service Terms
draft: The contract between Amazon Web Services and a customer of its compute service; it is the master agreement for the service this entry tracks.

name: Amazon Compute Service Level Agreement (EC2/ECS/Fargate)
draft: The availability and service-credit commitment Amazon Web Services makes for its compute service, governing the service this entry tracks.

name: AWS Acceptable Use Policy
draft: The acceptable-use restrictions Amazon Web Services imposes on customers of its compute service, forming part of the terms governing the service this entry tracks.

name: AWS Responsible AI Policy
draft: Service-specific terms Amazon Web Services applies to its AI and ML offerings, supplementing the master agreement for the compute service this entry tracks.

name: AWS GDPR Center (DPA)
draft: The data-processing terms Amazon Web Services offers customers of its compute service; they govern its processing of customer personal data in the service this entry tracks.

name: AWS Sub-processors
draft: The sub-processors Amazon Web Services engages to deliver its compute service, disclosed under the data-processing terms for the service this entry tracks.

name: AWS Privacy Notice
draft: How Amazon Web Services handles personal data of users of its compute service, which is the relationship this entry tracks.

name: AWS AI Service Cards
draft: The documentation Amazon Web Services publishes for its AI and ML services, describing part of the compute service this entry tracks.
